title: Qawaid Islah-i-Rusumat Wagairah Aqwam-i-Jattan Doaba Bist Jullundur
gloss: Rules of an association the object of which is to reform the Jat tribes of Doaba Bist Jullundur.
notes: Caste-reform association rules (Jat tribes of the Jullundur Doab).

title: Qawaid Managing Committee Arya Kannya Patshala, Bajwara
gloss: Rules of the Managing Committee, Arya Kannya Patshala, Bajwára.
publisher: B. Ratan Chand, Secretary of the Patshala
notes: Arya Samaj girls' school governance document.

author: Rama Nand, Dr.
title: Tahqiqat-i-Jadid
gloss: A collection of four lectures, namely, (1) on venereal diseases, (2) diseases of females, (3) essence of almonds and (4) plague and its prevention, serving as an advertisement of the medicines prepared by the author, who is a doctor.
notes: 15,000 free copies — patent-medicine advertising dressed as medical lectures.

title: Report. Annual report of the Victoria Diamond Jubilee Hindu Technical Institute, Punjab, for 1909-10
Report Arya Kannya Patshala, Bajwara, babat 1910-1911
gloss: Annual report of the Arya girls school Bajwára, for 1910-1911.
publisher: B. Ratan Chand, Secretary of the Patshala

title: Report Bhagwati Putri Patshala, Haryana
gloss: Report of the annual meeting of the Bhagwati Putri Pathshala (girls' school), Hariána, district Hoshiárpur, for Sammat 1965-1966.
notes: Dual date: Sammat 1965-1966. Smallest print run this quarter so far (100 copies).

title: Report. Report of the annual meeting of the Anjuman-i-Islamia, Fázilka (Ferozepore district), for the year 1327 Hijri
publisher: Shams-ud-din Khan, General Secretary of the Anjuman
notes: Muslim voluntary-association annual report; year given as 1327 Hijri.

title: Report. Report of the seventh anniversary of the Anjuman Yatimkhana (orphanage), Madrassa-tul-Quran, Siálkot city, for 1909-1910
publisher: Qazi Ali Ahmad, Secretary of the Anjuman
notes: Orphanage and Quran-school anniversary report — Muslim philanthropic institution-building.
